title: Yoga for Seniors
description: Improve your flexibility and balance with gentle yoga poses. Perfect for beginners.

title: Tai Chi Chuan (Beginners)
description: Learn the fundamental movements of Tai Chi to improve joint mobility and mental focus.

title: Zumba Gold for Active Agers
description: A lower-intensity dance fitness class set to zesty Latin music. Fun and easy to follow!

title: Watercolour Painting Basics
description: Express yourself through beautiful watercolour art in a friendly, relaxed setting.

title: Chinese Calligraphy Class
description: Learn the traditional art of Chinese calligraphy and master the beauty of ink strokes.

title: Acrylic Painting: Landscapes
description: Discover the joy of painting landscapes with vibrant acrylic colors.

title: Karaoke Singing Club
description: Sing your heart out to classic hits and enjoy a lively afternoon of music.

title: Ukulele for Beginners
description: Strum along to familiar tunes. We provide the instruments for beginners to try!

title: Keyboard Playing (Level 1)
description: Always wanted to play the piano? Start with this easy-paced electronic keyboard class.

title: Weekly Seniors Coffee Chat
description: Connect with your neighbors over a cup of traditional kopi and local snacks.

title: Active Ageing Centre Open House

description: A heartwarming session sharing stories and experiences with youth volunteers.

title: Smartphone Basics Workshop
description: Learn how to use WhatsApp, connect to Wi-Fi, and adjust your phone's text size.

title: Navigating e-Payments (PayNow)
description: Step-by-step guide to using PayNow safely for your hawker meals and groceries.

title: Anti-Scam & Cybersecurity Talk
description: Learn to identify phishing messages, fake friend calls, and protect your digital identity.

title: Therapeutic Horticulture
description: A guided gardening session designed to promote mental well-being and sensory stimulation.

title: Community in Bloom: Urban Farming
description: Join fellow residents in tending to a community vegetable and herb garden.

title: Guided Bird Watching Walk
description: Enjoy a gentle morning walk while spotting migratory birds with experienced guides.

title: Conversational Mandarin

title: Basic First Aid at Home

description: A leisurely guided tour exploring the artifacts and stories of Singapore's early settlers.

title: Kampong Glam Heritage Walk
description: Walk down memory lane and discover the rich history of the Kampong Glam precinct.

description: Watch master craftsmen demonstrate the intricate art of traditional Peranakan beadwork.

title: Mindful Meditation Session
location: Kong Meng San Phor Kark See Monastery

title: Interfaith Heritage Tour

title: Community Fellowship Breakfast
description: Join us for a morning of fellowship, warm breakfast, and community sharing.
